'''Dreyba''' was considered a great [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Artist/Legends|artist]].<ref name="CCG" />

He was credited with making a stone relief-[[Painting/Legends|painting]] of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] titled [[Ne Ganna Dateel Jabba/Legends|''Ne Ganna Dateel Jabba'']].<ref name="CCG" /> He also created the paintings ''[[Fighter's Courage]]'' and ''[[Warrior's Honor]]''.<ref name="SWG:FC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Fighter's Courage}}</ref><ref name="SWG:WH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Warrior's Honor}}</ref>
